pokemon:slowbro.name: Slowbro
pokemon:slowbro.summary: Slowbro’s tail has a Shellder firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can’t be used for fishing anymore. This causes Slowbro to grudgingly swim and catch prey instead.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Slowbro’s tail has a Shellder firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can’t be used for fishing anymore. This causes Slowbro to grudgingly swim and catch prey instead.
Though usually dim witted, it seems to become inspired if the Shellder on its tail bites down.
Though usually dim witted, it seems to become inspired if the Shellder on its tail bites down.
The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
An attached SHELLDER won't let go because of the tasty flavor that oozes out of its tail.
Though usually dim witted, it seems to become inspired if the SHELLDER on its tail bites down.
Its tail has a SHELLDER firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can’t be used for fishing anymore. This forces it to reluctantly swim and catch prey.
When a SLOWPOKE went hunting in the sea, its tail was bitten by a SHELLDER. That made it evolve into SLOWBRO.
If the tail-biting SHELLDER is thrown off in a harsh battle, it reverts to being an ordi­ nary SLOWPOKE.
If the tail-biting SHELLDER is thrown off in a harsh battle, it reverts to being an ordinary SLOWPOKE.
The SHELLDER that latches onto SLOWPOKE’s tail is said to feed on the host’s leftover scraps.
Lives lazily by the sea. If the Shellder on its tail comes off, it becomes a Slowpoke again.
Lives lazily by the sea. If the Shellder on its tail comes off, it becomes a Slowpoke again.
Whenever Shellder bites down hard on its tail, it gives Slowbro a flash of inspiration...which it forgets a moment later.
Slowbro’s tail has a Shellder firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can’t be used for fishing anymore. This causes Slowbro to grudgingly swim and catch prey instead.
Though usually dim witted, it seems to become inspired if the SHELLDER on its tail bites down.
Though usually dim witted, it seems to become inspired if the SHELLDER on its tail bites down.
The SHELLDER that is latched onto SLOWPOKE's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.
SLOWBRO’s tail has a SHELLDER firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can’t be used for fishing anymore. This causes SLOWBRO to grudgingly swim and catch prey instead.
SLOWBRO’s tail has a SHELLDER firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can’t be used for fishing anymore. This causes SLOWBRO to grudgingly swim and catch prey instead.
Being bitten by a Shellder shocked this Pokémon into standing on two legs. If the Shellder lets go, it seems Slowbro will turn back into a Slowpoke.
Naturally dull to begin with, it lost its ability to feel pain due to SHELLDER's seeping poison.
Naturally dull to begin with, it lost its ability to feel pain due to SHELLDER’s seeping poison.
It spaces out while gazing at the sea. With Shellder’s poison flowing through its body, it becomes even spacier.
Slowpoke became Slowbro when a Shellder bit on to its tail. Sweet flavors seeping from the tail make the Shellder feel as if its life is a dream.
Shellder, in its greed to suck out more and more sweetness from Slowbro’s tail, has metamorphosed into a spiral-shaped shell.
Spacing out is basically all it does. It turns back into Slowpoke if its tail, along with Shellder, breaks off.
Though usually dim witted, it seems to become inspired if the Shellder on its tail bites down.
Though usually dim witted, it seems to become inspired if the Shellder on its tail bites down.
An attached Shellder won’t let go because of the tasty flavor that oozes out of its tail.
When a Slowpoke went hunting in the sea, its tail was bitten by a Shellder. That made it evolve into Slowbro.
Lives lazily by the sea. If the SHELLDER on its tail comes off, it becomes a SLOWPOKE again.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Slowbro’s tail has a Shellder firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can’t be used for fishing anymore. This causes Slowbro to grudgingly swim and catch prey instead.

pokemon:slowpoke.name: Slowpoke
pokemon:slowpoke.summary: Slowpoke uses its tail to catch prey by dipping it in water at the side of a river. However, this Pokémon often forgets what it’s doing and often spends entire days just loafing at water’s edge.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Slowpoke uses its tail to catch prey by dipping it in water at the side of a river. However, this Pokémon often forgets what it’s doing and often spends entire days just loafing at water’s edge.
Although slow, it is skilled at fishing with its tail. It does not feel pain if its tail is bitten.
Although slow, it is skilled at fishing with its tail. It does not feel pain if its tail is bitten.
Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.
It is always so absent-minded that it won't react, even if its flavorful tail is bitten.
Although slow, it is skilled at fishing with its tail. It does not feel pain if its tail is bitten.
It catches prey by dipping its tail in water at the side of a river. But it often forgets what it is doing and spends entire days just loafing at water’s edge.
It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.
It lazes vacantly near water. If something bites its tail, it won't even notice for a whole day.
It lazes vacantly near water. If something bites its tail, it won’t even notice for a whole day.
Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes five seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.
Incredibly slow and sluggish. It is quite content to loll about without worrying about the time.
Incredibly slow and sluggish. It is quite content to loll about without worrying about the time.
Alolan home cooking involves drying Slowpoke tails and then simmering them into a salty stew.
Slowpoke uses its tail to catch prey by dipping it in water at the side of a river. However, this Pokémon often forgets what it’s doing and often spends entire days just loafing at water’s edge.
Although slow, it is skilled at fishing with its tail. It does not feel pain if its tail is bitten.
Although slow, it is skilled at fishing with its tail. It does not feel pain if its tail is bitten.
Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.
SLOWPOKE uses its tail to catch prey by dipping it in water at the side of a river. However, this POKéMON often forgets what it’s doing and often spends entire days just loafing at water’s edge.
SLOWPOKE uses its tail to catch prey by dipping it in water at the side of a river. However, this POKéMON often forgets what it’s doing and often spends entire days just loafing at water’s edge.
When this Pokémon’s tail is soaked in water, sweetness seeps from it. Slowpoke uses this trait to lure in and fish up other Pokémon.
A sweet sap leaks from its tail's tip. Although not nutritious, the tail is pleasant to chew on.
A sweet sap leaks from its tail’s tip. Although not nutritious, the tail is pleasant to chew on.
Its long tail often breaks off. It doesn’t really feel any pain, though, and the tail grows back, so Slowpoke isn’t particularly bothered.
Slow-witted and oblivious, this Pokémon won’t feel any pain if its tail gets eaten. It won’t notice when its tail grows back, either.
Although their tails, which fall off naturally, can easily be found lying around, they’re a precious ingredient for cooking.
There are some places where Slowpoke is worshiped because of a long-standing belief that whenever Slowpoke yawns, it rains.
Although slow, it is skilled at fishing with its tail. It does not feel pain if its tail is bitten.
Although slow, it is skilled at fishing with its tail. It does not feel pain if its tail is bitten.
It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.
It lazes vacantly near water. If something bites its tail, it won’t even notice for a whole day.
Incredibly slow and sluggish. It is quite content to loll about without worrying about the time.
